div.h2: write_buf_t Struct Memory Layout and Offset Mechanics

g.text: data[] Heap Buffer — State Progression (capacity = 65536 B)

text.tspan: Prevents unbounded write buffer growth from slow readers

g.text: 0x00 (+0) │ data │ 8 B │ ptr → heap-allocated byte array
0x10 (+16) │ write_offset │ 8 B │ first unsent byte (consume ptr)
State C: After partial write(2000 B) → offset advances
State D: After compaction (offset > capacity/2 threshold)

ul.li: When write_offset == write_len: both reset to 0 (buffer logically empty)
data pointer is never NULL after successful write_buf_new()

g.text: Compact trigger: offset (2000) > capacity/2 (32768)? NO — compaction not yet triggered
compaction cost = O(pending bytes) │ amortized O(1) per byte appended
